title: National Geographic Spyglass
description: Turn a spyglass into the National Geographic-styled show
body:
This is a simple resource pack that turns a spyglass's GUI into the National Geographic-styled overlay.

This resource pack changes the spyglass' _GUI_ only. Not the item texture/model/sounds etc.

![National Geographic-styled logo at the bottom side off the screen instead of the default spyglass GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6b0c2a1c02bf77905a2d238bb8988f316b011b6.png)
